Floor4_Start.text: {bg:Floor4}{center}{color:lime}{blip:3}{showTextbox}September 17{nl}Joypolis, Event Hall 4th Floor

Floor4_Start.name: Gumshoe
Floor4_Start.text: {color:white}{hideTextbox}{sprite:Gumshoe["Sad"]}{hideCharacter}{p:500}{fadeInCharacter}{showTextbox}{blip:1}{sprite:Gumshoe["Sad"]}{startBGM:investigation,true}Maggey is a poor kid, pal.

Floor4_Start.name: Gumshoe
Floor4_Start.text: {sprite:Gumshoe["LookingAway"]}They say if a dog walks, it gets hit by a stick...

Floor4_Start.name: Gumshoe
Floor4_Start.text: And when Maggey walks around, she gets swept up in trouble, like nothing but unfair things ever happen to her...

Floor4_Start.name: Gumshoe
Floor4_Start.text: {sprite:Gumshoe["Angry"]}{playSound:shake}{shake:500}I'm sure this time is some kind of mistake, too!{nl}There's no way she could've killed anyone!

Floor4_Start.name: Phoenix
Floor4_Start.text: {blip:1,false}{sprite:Gumshoe["Sad"]}{sprite:Gumshoe["ScratchingHead2"]}I hear you.

Floor4_Start.name: Gumshoe
Floor4_Start.text: {blip:1,true}{hideTextbox}{sprite:Gumshoe["ScratchingHead"]}{showTextbox}{flash}{playSound:cling}{sprite:Gumshoe["Normal"]}{stopBGM:true}...{nl}Oh, right.{nl}There's something I wanted to tell you, just between us.

Floor4_Start.name: Gumshoe
Floor4_Start.text: {hideTextbox}{sprite:Gumshoe["ScratchingHead"]}{showTextbox}{sprite:Gumshoe["Normal"]}This is top secret.{nl}You can't tell anybody.

Floor4_Start.name: Phoenix
Floor4_Start.text: {blip:1,false}What is it?

Floor4_Start.name: Gumshoe
Floor4_Start.text: {blip:1,true}The victim, Ms. Nakaki...{nl}She was a suit actress, right?

Floor4_Start.name: Gumshoe
Floor4_Start.text: Truth is...{p:300} back in the day...{nl}{sprite:Gumshoe["Determined"]}{playSound:shake}{flash}{shake:500}I also wanted to be a suit actor!{p:400}

Floor4_Start.name: Phoenix
Floor4_Start.text: {playSound:shake}{flash}{shake:200}{blip:0,false}{color:lightblue}(...I-I really don't care!)

Floor4_Start.name: Phoenix
Floor4_Start.text: {color:white}{blip:1,false}{sprite:Gumshoe["Normal"]}{startBGM:investigation,true}T-That's it?

Floor4_Start.name: Gumshoe
Floor4_Start.text: {hideTextbox}{sprite:Gumshoe["ScratchingHead"]}{showTextbox}{sprite:Gumshoe["Thinking"]}{blip:1,true}Anyway, {nl} Take a look at this.{showEvidenceIcon:left,mask_photo}

Floor4_Start.name: Gumshoe
Floor4_Start.text: It's the Steel Samurai mask the victim,{nl}Ms. Nakaki, was wearing at the time of the incident.

Floor4_Start.name: Phoenix
Floor4_Start.text: {blip:1,false}I get that, but...{nl}what's your point?

Floor4_Start.name: Gumshoe
Floor4_Start.text: {blip:1,true}The eyebrow area is dented a little,{nl}but other than that, not a single scratch.

Floor4_Start.name: Phoenix
Floor4_Start.text: {blip:0,false}{color:lightblue}(Only the eyebrow area is dented...)
{hideEvidenceIcon}{addEvidence:mask_photo,true}{playSound:evidenceUnlock}{blip:0,false}{color:lightblue}"Mask Evidence Photo" added to the Court Record.

Floor4_Start.name: Gumshoe
Floor4_Start.text: {color:white}{blip:1,true}{sprite:Gumshoe["Normal"]}I can tell because I wanted to be a suit actor myself.

Floor4_Start.name: Gumshoe
Floor4_Start.text: {sprite:Gumshoe["Angry"]}{playSound:shake}{flash}{shake:500}The topknot is the Steel Samurai's lifeline, pal!

Floor4_Start.name: Gumshoe
Floor4_Start.text: So she must've...{playSound:shake}{flash}{shake:500}{nl}even while falling, she protected the topknot with her life!

Floor4_Start.name: Phoenix
Floor4_Start.text: {blip:0,false}{color:lightblue}{playSound:shake}{flash}{shake:500}(No... I don't think that's right.)

Floor4_Start.name: Gumshoe
Floor4_Start.text: {color:white}{blip:1,true}There's no way Maggey would kill{nl}someone that admirable.

Floor4_Start.name: Gumshoe
Floor4_Start.text: No, no matter who it is,{nl}there's no way Maggey would ever commit murder!

Floor4_Start.name: Phoenix
Floor4_Start.text: {blip:1,false}On that, we agree. I swear,{nl}I'll prove her innocence.

Floor4_Start.name: Phoenix
Floor4_Start.text: {blip:0,false}{color:lightblue}(All right. I think that's everything here.)

Floor4_Start.name: Phoenix
Floor4_Start.text: {color:lightblue}(Once I've got all the information, I'll head to court.{nl}That's where I'll make everything clear!){color:white}{setState:floor4_done,true}{jump:Floor4_Default}{sectionEnd}
